${modID}:ExampleCard.NAME: Name
${modID}:ExampleCard.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This will automatically be used if the card is upgraded. Remove it if unneeded.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: You can put more text in here.
If you need to use it for stuff.
Blizzard is a good example for this.

${modID}:Pursue.NAME: Pursue
${modID}:Pursue.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Replay your last played card. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:Pursue.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Replay your last played card.

${modID}:CartwheelStrike.NAME: Cartwheel Strike
${modID}:CartwheelStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage twice. NL Draw !M! cards.

${modID}:TwistTheKnife.NAME: Twist the Knife
${modID}:TwistTheKnife.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the enemy has Bleed, gain Energy.
${modID}:TwistTheKnife.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the enemy has Bleed, gain two Energy.

${modID}:Lacerate.NAME: Lacerate
${modID}:Lacerate.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage and apply !M! Bleed 3 times.

${modID}:SickThrills.NAME: Sick Thrills
${modID}:SickThrills.DESCRIPTION: When an Attack deals unblocked damage, apply !M! Bleed.

${modID}:StudyFoe.NAME: Study Foe
${modID}:StudyFoe.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Next turn, Initiate Momentum.

${modID}:Exploit.NAME: Exploit
${modID}:Exploit.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Momentum: Apply !M! Vulnerable.

${modID}:Flurry.NAME: Flurry
${modID}:Flurry.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage twice. NL Initiate Momentum.

${modID}:BackOff.NAME: Back Off
${modID}:BackOff.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Momentum: Apply !M! Weak.
